services_subtitle: Manage your reverse proxy, HTTPS proxy, and redirect entries
download_cert_help: Install this certificate once on your devices to trust all Caddy-managed HTTPS sites on your local network.
backend_hint_proxy: Plain HTTP reverse proxy — enter IP:Port
backend_hint_https_proxy: HTTPS backend — https:// prefix is set automatically when you switch type; TLS skip-verify is always applied
backend_hint_redirect: Redirect target URL — {uri} is appended automatically to forward the request path
self_hostname_warning: ⚠️ Changing this hostname will make the UI unreachable at the current address. You will be redirected automatically after saving.
confirm_delete_suffix: This action cannot be undone and will reload Caddy.
redirecting_message: The UI hostname was changed. Redirecting to the new address in
no_services: No services configured yet. Add your first service to get started.
no_results: No services match the current filter.
error_invalid_domain: Invalid domain — use letters, digits, dots, hyphens only
error_loading: Failed to load services from server
error_cert_not_found: Root CA certificate not found on server. Is the Caddy data volume mounted?
cert_info: Caddy generates a local Certificate Authority when using local_certs. Install the root certificate once on each client device to trust all Caddy-issued HTTPS certificates.
